description: Configure Snipe-IT for medical device compliance tracking. Create a custom fieldset named 'Medical Device Compliance' containing the following fields: 'FDA 510(k) Number' (Text, required), 'Next Calibration Due' (Date, required), 'Patient Contact Class' (List with options: 'Non-contact', 'Surface Contact', 'Implant'; not required), and 'Biomedical Cert Expiry' (Date, not required). Establish a 'Medical Devices' asset category and a manufacturer named 'GE Healthcare'. Define an asset model 'GE Carescape B650' (Model No. 'B650-001') associated with the 'Medical Devices' category, 'GE Healthcare' manufacturer, and 'Medical Device Compliance' fieldset. Finally, register an asset with tag 'MED-001', serial 'SN-GEB650-2024-0001', and status 'Ready to Deploy', ensuring the custom fields are populated with: FDA 510(k) Number 'K201234', Next Calibration Due '2025-09-15', Patient Contact Class 'Surface Contact', and Biomedical Cert Expiry '2026-01-31'.
